title: Citrusy Herring Stew
description: A flavorful and healthy stew made with herring, citrusy flavors, and gluten-free ingredients.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the herring fillets and cook for 2-3 minutes per side.
Pour in the citrus juice and gluten-free stock, and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and let simmer for 10-12 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Note: Cooking time may vary depending on the thickness of the herring fillets.
